name: DeepSeekMath 7B
note: Debuted GRPO reinforcement learning (later reused for R1); DeepSeekMath-RL 7B hit 51.7% on MATH via CoT, near GPT-4/Gemini-Ultra level at just 7B.

results.notes: DeepSeekMath-7B-RL variant (matches this catalog entry's hf link deepseek-ai/deepseek-math-7b-rl), Chinese GaoKao aggregate, zero-shot CoT greedy decoding, from Table 4 of the Qwen2.5-Math technical report where DeepSeekMath-7B-RL is used as a specific-model baseline (third-party evaluation by the Qwen team).

Qwen2.5-Math Technical Report (arXiv:2409.12122), Table 3, English math benchmark suite where DeepSeekMath-7B-RL is used as a specific-model baseline (same paper the corpus already cites for this model's independent gaokao-math result). Raw row verified: 'GSM8K 88.2 | MATH 52.4 | Minerva Math 20.6 | GaoKao 2023 En 43.6 | Olympiad Bench 19.0 | College Math 37.5 | MMLU STEM 64.8 | Avg. 46.6' (CoT mode). GSM8K/MATH already tracked under other sources so not re-added; Minerva Math and College Math have no taxonomy slug.

Same Table 3 row of the Qwen2.5-Math Technical Report (arXiv:2409.12122) as the olympiadbench addition above — MMLU STEM column for DeepSeekMath-7B-RL, CoT mode, third-party evaluation by the Qwen team.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via arxiv 2402.03300 (fetched via ar5iv rendering): initialized from DeepSeek-Coder-Base-v1.5 7B, paper's Table 5 literally shows DeepSeekMath-RL 7B row '88.2% 51.7% 79.6% 88.8%' — GSM8K 88.2 and MATH 51.7 (CoT, no tools) confirmed exactly. Feb 2024 release date matches arXiv submission date (2402.xxxxx = Feb 2024).
